published_prior_art.cite: MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased — Sections 2.2–3 define exact-time illness-death interventions and their observed-data risks.
KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE — Hölder point-target regularity is standard minimax substrate.
MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased — provides an EIF for its own truncated-and-renormalized smoothed initiation intervention.
ArmstrongKolesar2020HonestCI — standard symmetric-kernel Hölder bias and zero-bias reduction.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_dose_response_minimax — fixed-dose Hölder minimax converse, not a censored multistate shrinking-window limit experiment.

published_prior_art.cite: SchindlShenKennedy2024IncrementalContinuous gives effective-sample-size scaling for tilted continuous exposures; MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased gives a fixed-window illness-death EIF; neither states the CAR illness-death Gaussian/compound-Poisson boundary.

ArmstrongKolesar2020HonestCI and AiHuangZhang2026UniformContinuousTreatment provide closest pointwise/bandwidth and continuous-treatment inference analogues, but not this survival phase-regime question.

novelty_flags.label: oeq:exact-target-implication
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest omitted comparator is Ai, Huang, and Zhang (2026), Data-Driven Uniform Inference for General Continuous Treatment Models via Minimum-Variance Weighting, which gives local-linear continuous-treatment uniform inference and data-driven bias control.

novelty_flags.label: oeq:exact-target-implication
novelty_flags.one_line: “The bandwidth region” and “rate-optimal diameter” are not defined as a named set, threshold, or interval functional, so the question lacks a single formal focal object.

soundness_flags.label: ass:sequential-exchangeability
soundness_flags.one_line: The cited source assumes causal validity of the observed-hazard intervention rather than establishing the displayed full-versus-observed counterfactual-hazard equalities as its standard sequential-randomization condition.

soundness_flags.label: oeq:effective-count-phase
soundness_flags.one_line: Within the defined class R_n every estimator is required to have influence function phi_{P,b_n}, while ass:local-riesz supplies b_n Var(phi_{P,b_n})→sigma_P^2; thus the claimed sigma_P^2/m_n “sharp regular frontier” is an assumption-and-definition unfold, not an efficiency comparison.

soundness_flags.label: oeq:exact-target-implication
soundness_flags.one_line: “Honest exact-target interval,” “rate-optimal diameter,” and the admissible interval class are undefined, so the asserted bandwidth-region decision has no stated coverage, uniformity, or optimality criterion.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: honest_scope: interior Hölder illness-death regime
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: One initiation, interior u_star<t_0, known s and L, local positivity, CAR censoring, and bounded hazards are accepted as conditional model restrictions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any phase-limit or exact-target conclusion is conditional on this fixed interior Hölder illness-death regime; adaptation and broader multistate claims are outside the headline.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:local-riesz
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The local EIF information scale b_n v_{P,b_n}→sigma_P^2 is accepted only as a conditional regularity premise.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: A repaired phase theorem may condition on this variance scaling, but may not call sigma_P^2/m_n a sharp efficiency frontier without comparison to a larger locally regular estimator class.

source_verification_receipts.locator: p. 2, Section 2.2, and p. 3, lines 104–117 and 171–191
source_verification_receipts.verified_claim: The paper distinguishes the full-filtration intervention from the observed-filtration intervention, states that correspondence requires absence of particular unobserved common causes in a manuscript in preparation, and then explicitly assumes observed-hazard causal validity.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace ass:sequential-exchangeability with a precisely cited causal-validity/no-unmeasured-common-cause condition, or retag it novel and explain why the full-versus-observed intensity equality is credible for the intended data.

Delete the definition-induced “sharp regular variance frontier” clause or redefine the comparison class as all locally regular estimators under explicit local alternatives, then prove an efficiency lower bound separately.

Define a named exact-target interval class and bandwidth frontier, including coverage level, uniform Hölder model, diameter loss, and the candidate bias-aware construction; state the Gaussian-region question against that object.
Add Ai, Huang, and Zhang (2026) to related work and state exactly why its uniform continuous-treatment bands do not address the bounded-effective-count CAR survival limit.

recommended_next_step: Revise the two open questions to replace the definitional variance claim and undefined exact-target interval criterion, correct the causal-validity assumption citation, and then resubmit the field-tier phase-boundary kernel.
